debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
inst✝⁵ : CommRing A
inst✝⁴ : IsNoetherianRing A
inst✝³ : @HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A inst✝⁵
M : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup M
inst✝¹ : Module A M
inst✝ : Module.Finite A M
hMT : IsTorsion A M
⊢ ∃ ι x p,
    ∃ (_ : ∀ (i : ι), (p i).asIdeal.primeHeight = 1),
      ∃ e, ∃ (_ : ∀ (i : ι), 0 < e i), M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] ((i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i)

    have hne : sigma.Nonempty := by

        rw [h] at this
        exact this

      have : Subsingleton M := Module.subsingleton_of_isPseudoNull this
      exact hM.false
    have hs : sigma ⊆ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1} := Set.inter_subset_right
    obtain ⟨_, hPID⟩ := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma hs hne hfin

      · rw [Ideal.primeHeight_eq_zero_iff] at hp

        use s, ?_, hs

      · specialize h (by rwa [← Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite])
        simp at h
    · rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
      intro p _
      infer_instance
  · push_neg at h
    rw [Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] at h
    sorry
